ogTitle: Tooradin vs Toorloo Arm: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tooradin and Toorloo Arm.
heading: Tooradin vs Toorloo Arm — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tooradin, Victoria and Toorloo Arm, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toorloo Arm has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Tooradin (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tooradin or Toorloo Arm safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tooradin has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Toorloo Arm scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tooradin scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Toorloo Arm scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tooradin or Toorloo Arm?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toorloo Arm has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
